title: libertia micrantha
intro: Libertia micrantha, also known as the New Zealand iris, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Libertia micrantha include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Libertia micrantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
